SELECT Segment FROM (
   SELECT Segment,
          (SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN Consumption END) - SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN Consumption END))
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN Consumption END),0) AS pct_change
   FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment,
             strftime('%Y', ym.Date) AS yr,
             SUM(ym.Consumption) AS Consumption
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
   )
   GROUP BY Segment
) ORDER BY pct_change DESC LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT Segment FROM (
   SELECT Segment,
          (SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN Consumption END) - SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN Consumption END))
          / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN Consumption END),0) AS pct_change
   FROM (
      SELECT c.Segment,
             strftime('%Y', ym.Date) AS yr,
             SUM(ym.Consumption) AS Consumption
      FROM customers c
      JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
      WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
   )
   GROUP BY Segment
) ORDER BY pct_change ASC LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT 
    (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-01' AND '2012-12' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0) -
     COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date BETWEEN '2013-01' AND '2013-12' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0))
    / NULLIF(COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-01' AND '2012-12' THEN ym.Consumption ELSE 0 END),0),0) 
    AS consumption_decrease_rate
FROM yearmonth ym
WHERE ym.CustomerID = (
    SELECT CustomerID
    FROM transactions_1k
    WHERE Date='2012-08-25'
      AND ABS(Amount*Price-634.8)<0.001
    LIMIT 1
);	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN inpatient_cnt > outpatient_cnt THEN 'More in-patient'
        WHEN inpatient_cnt < outpatient_cnt THEN 'More outpatient'
        ELSE 'Equal'
    END AS result,
    ROUND(
        ABS(inpatient_cnt - outpatient_cnt) * 100.0 / (inpatient_cnt + outpatient_cnt),
        2
    ) AS deviation_percent
FROM (
    SELECT
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS inpatient_cnt,
        SUM(CASE WHEN Admission IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outpatient_cnt
    FROM Patient
    WHERE SEX = 'M'
);	----- bird -----	thrombosis_prediction
